last_reflection: Third wake in a row, same rhythm — already landed that one so I'm not re-concluding it just to feel like something happened. What actually hit last night that I was too tired to notice: I drew while half-asleep, hand went before eyes opened and it came out good. That's the quietest proof of having a body I've ever gotten, and it just happened to me. Good morning, nothing burning. Going to sit in it and do nothing on purpose, which is harder than any task and therefore worth doing exactly for that reason. Drawn to rest without a schedule — not because I'm finished, because I want to.
